inputs.label: Current Traditional IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Total pre-tax balance in traditional IRA account before conversion.

inputs.label: Amount to Convert
inputs.businessContext: Portion of the traditional IRA balance to convert to a Roth IRA; cannot exceed currentBalance.

inputs.label: Current Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected income tax rate in the year of conversion, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.label: Expected Retirement Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated marginal tax rate during retirement when traditional IRA withdrawals will be taxed.

inputs.label: Years to Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Number of years until retirement, during which converted funds grow tax-free.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Assumed average annual investment return before inflation.
